party_specialist: Nhilara Vel'quinar (Level 8, Barbarian 5/Rogue 3, deploys on Drow/espionage/Underdark ops)
insignia: Rising sun (8 rays), broken chain below horizon line, circular border
campaign_status: ARC 1-3 COMPLETE. ARC 4 COMPLETE (Ashara captured, Vaelen freed, all inverted stones secured, Phase Three neutralized). ARC 5 BEGUN — Vel'thara first contact. ALL 14 NODES ACTIVE (13 full + Node 13 at 22%). Anchor Point permanently active — embassy established with the Vel'thara. Accord signed. Aperture open. Garden planted. Ward network complete for the first time in 3,248 years. Year 1249 AS, late Frostmere.

property.name: Dawnwatch Homestead
property.location: Fenhollow inland rise, 20 min from village
structures: main house (loom + tailoring desk, Tessa's loft upgraded, moonpetal display case)
Dawnwatch Tower (4 levels + lookout ring, telescope, ward-glyph alarm)
forge (+ Ashara containment room, lead-lined, ward-suppressed)
herb garden (doubled, ghost-nettle shade structure, moonpetal seeds planted)

professions.zaryth: Alchemist ✔, Tinkerer ✔, Ward Engineer ✔ (Binding Initiate, Lesson 110)

ward_status.outer_ward_ring: ALL 14 NODES ACTIVE — first time in 3,248 years
ward_status.node_1: 64% — REPAIRED (Southern Deep, remote boost from Anchor Point)
ward_status.anchor_point: PERMANENTLY ACTIVE. 7 Heartstones seated. Control interface online. Embassy with Vel'thara. Vaelen + Drell stationed as keepers. Garden planted.
ward_status.heartstones: 8 seated at Fenhollow relay + 7 seated at Anchor Point = 15 total. 6 inverted stones contained at forge.

keeper_stations.fenhollow: 91% — full relay hub, 8 Heartstones seated, keeper remote active
keeper_stations.aelindra: 58% — repaired, map room, vault, Deep Road entrance
keeper_stations.ashara: Relay-reset, addon profile active, fortified (triple-locked, alarmed, remote hard-seal)
keeper_stations.vel_arath: 91% — surged during Anchor Point activation. Humming wall cracked. COMPROMISED — Vel'sharen will investigate. Deep Road sealed from Fenhollow side.

vel_thara_embassy.location: Anchor Point, 400 ft beneath Thornback Gulch, Ashport
vel_thara_embassy.aperture: Open, stable, permanent. 6 ft golden doorway. Zaryth can close at any time.
vel_thara_embassy.keepers: Vaelen (creator of the ward network) + Warden Drell
vel_thara_embassy.accord: Signed Day 244. Threshold open. One Speaker at a time. Shared garden. Exchange not extraction. Kill switch with the Warden. Names sacred.
vel_thara_embassy.vel_thara: 12-civilization resonance federation. Beings of crystallized frequency. Non-hostile. Communicated via music. Name: Vel'thara ('those who listen in the light').
vel_thara_embassy.garden: Moonpetals planted — organic petals on crystal stems. Both worlds tending.
vel_thara_embassy.gifts_received: Moonpetal flower (crystal stem), resonance map of Vel'thara world, Vel'thara name

transport.trimaran_stormcapes_promise: Tidemeet harbor. Western triangle + Veldmere shuttle. Maren Voss + Corr.
transport.trimaran_eilistraees_grace: Tidemeet harbor. Hybrid resonance drive. Lyriel captain + Dren engineer.
transport.dawnwatch_coach: At homestead. Resonance-assisted. 2 horses. Vex driving.
transport.threshold_runner: Deep Road wagon. Fenhollow ↔ Aelindra in 9 hours.
transport.keeper_remote_system: Operational profiles: Fenhollow + Aelindra + Ashara addon

inter_city_network: Sister Venn (Chapel of the Marsh Light, Fenhollow)

library.notable_additions: Atlas of the Vel'thara — First Edition (Sylvara + Torven)

prisoners_and_probation.ashara: Homestead forge containment. Ward-suppressed. Probation. Cooperative. Nhilara shadow, Vaelith overseer. 3,217-year-old Binder. Participated in Anchor Point activation + Vel'thara contact.
prisoners_and_probation.edrin_vael: Homestead — supervised. Cooperating. Alchemist. High intel value.
prisoners_and_probation.thessara_vael: Homestead — supervised. Probation. Reunited with Edrin. Archive credentials confiscated.
prisoners_and_probation.syvra: Homestead — Vel'sharen agent. Provided cipher keys.
prisoners_and_probation.greymoor_agents_x2: Cole's custody — military tribunal for murder of Corporal Wren Hale.

defectors.velyndra: Vel'quinar homestead. Glassworker (master Drow technique). Working with Sylvara.
defectors.taelar: Vel'quinar homestead. Spider-silk weaver. Working with Thessaly.
defectors.sylla: Vel'quinar homestead. Age 7. School student #15. Calls the moonpetal 'the star flower'.

vel_quinar_homestead.members: Ilyana (Matron), Kael, Sera, Nalia, Dren, Vel, Thorn, Vex, Ryn, Pim, Ash, Lyriel, Nhilara, Velyndra, Taelar, Sylla
vel_quinar_homestead.status: Complete — underground quarters (5 rooms + common room), surface rooms (3), underground armory (ward-locked), prison cells (2, ward-suppressed). Stone wall. Ward perimeter.
vel_quinar_homestead.trades: Spider-silk weaving (Taelar + Thessaly), Drow glasswork (Velyndra + Sylvara)
vel_quinar_homestead.defense: 8 combat-capable. 4 hand crossbows + 1 heavy crossbow + 4 dark steel spears + 4 reinforced shields + 5 leather sets. Ward perimeter + tower alarm. 3-shift night watch.

allies_at_homestead.vaelith: Last Warden of the Vigil. Resonance-bonded keeper. Teaching Zaryth (Lesson 110). Overseeing Ashara. Containing inverted stones.

allies_at_anchor_point.vaelen: Creator of the ward network. Freed Day 234. Physical form. Keeper of the Anchor Point embassy. Tending the garden.
allies_at_anchor_point.drell: Warden Drell, Keeper of Node 2. Woken from 38-year dormancy. Stationed at Anchor Point with Vaelen.
